items.content_html: The Neon CLI now ships `neon inspect db`: read-only, high-signal Postgres diagnostics that answer "what is slow?" without leaving the terminal or writing a single catalog query. Each subcommand runs one known-good query against Postgres' own statistics and catalog views and prints a clean table (or JSON/YAML for scripting).
items.title: Debug your Postgres from the terminal: a tour of `neon inspect db` | Blog — Neon Docs
